title: The Log Points Forward
description: On pages 17, 18, 19, this part focuses on robin boards the merry. Nico Robin appears aboard the Going Merry and forces the crew to confront the fact that a former enemy now wants to travel with them.
scene: This scene belongs to the Robin Boards the Merry sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Nico Robin, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The marimes probably would've taken it.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Nope, this is the last one.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Welp, we're countin' on y'all then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Miss Hina! We've located their ship!

summary: Nico Robin appears aboard the Going Merry and forces the crew to confront the fact that a former enemy now wants to travel with them.
